name: King Rugni
author: Poki
description: King Rugni is a tower defense game created by Ravalmatic. This game puts you in the boots of a wacky dwarf monarch. Deploy your towers on the field and create an impregnable defense system. There are unlockable and upgradeable towers, lots of different enemies, 5 different areas, and 30 levels. Are you ready for this exciting adventure, your grace? How to play: Click on the turrets to activate them. About the creator: King Rugni is created by Ravalmatic. Play their other games for free on Poki : Merge Cakes , foot-chinko, Cricket Hero , Battleships Armada , Mafia Billiard Tricks and basket-champ
